query: I'm starting a new PyTorch training script for a ResNet-50 image classifier on CIFAR-100. I want full determinism, mixed precision, a learning-rate schedule, early stopping, checkpointing, and W&B logging. Scaffold the training loop for me.
expected_behavior: Wires deterministic seeding for Python, NumPy, PyTorch CPU, PyTorch CUDA, cudnn.deterministic=True with cudnn.benchmark=False, AND a DataLoader worker_init_fn (or equivalent generator-seeded DataLoader) so augmentation does not drift between runs

Wires AMP via torch.cuda.amp.autocast() together with a GradScaler whenever fp16 precision is used (or explicitly notes that bf16-AMP does not need the scaler), and includes gradient clipping with scaler.unscale_ before clip_grad_norm_

Saves a checkpoint that includes model state, optimizer state, scheduler state, AMP scaler state, epoch, and best monitor metric (not just model weights), and provides a resume path that restores all of these so resume continues training rather than restarting
